description: Project-specific 513-class voxel vocabulary used by the FDG 2026 constraint-learnability experiments. Token 0 is air; tokens 1-512 are the most frequent non-air source tokens in the filtered VQ-VAE training set, remapped for the VQ-VAE voxel decoder.
notes: This is a project-specific remapped vocabulary, not an official Minecraft block vocabulary.
The non-air vocabulary is selected by source-token frequency after the same max-dimension and minimum-block filters used for VQ-VAE training.

rom1504 entries are retained as raw int16 schematic tokens because that source stores mixed raw schematic encodings; the training pipeline treats each unique raw value as a distinct block/material token.
The paper reports this vocabulary as 513 remapped block tokens: 512 non-air tokens plus air.
